All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractPlayer
Abstract base implementation of IPlayer that manages the shared state and logic common to all player types in the Cincuentazo game.
Card
Represents a single playing card with a number, suit, face direction, and back color.
CardTest
Unit tests for Card.
ComputerPlayer
Represents an AI-controlled player in the Cincuentazo card game.
Deck
Represents a double standard deck of 104 playing cards, composed of two complete 52-card sets â€” one with red backs and one with blue backs.
DeckTest
Unit tests for Deck.
Game
Orchestrates the Cincuentazo game: manages player order, turn progression, player elimination, and the win condition.
GameController
Controller for the main game view (GameView.fxml).
GameException
Base checked exception for all domain-specific errors in the Cincuentazo game.
GameException.EmptyDeckException
Thrown when a card is requested from the deck but both the main deck and the discard pile are empty, making it impossible to deal any card.
GameException.InvalidTurnException
Thrown when a player attempts to take an action outside of their turn.
GameException.PlayerEliminatedException
Thrown when an eliminated player attempts to perform any game action.
GameException.SumExceededException
Thrown when a player attempts to play a card that would cause the table sum to exceed 50, violating the main rule of Cincuentazo.
GameTest
Unit tests for Game.
GameTimer
Manages the two timer threads used during a Cincuentazo game: General timer â€” runs for the entire game, firing ITimerListener.onTick(int) every second so the controller can update the elapsed-time label in the UI. Machine turn timer â€” fires once after a random delay of 2â€“4 seconds (ITimerListener.onMachineTurnReady()) to simulate the computer "thinking", then fires again after 1â€“2 seconds (ITimerListener.onMachineDrawReady()) to simulate drawing.
HumanPlayer
Represents the human player in the Cincuentazo card game.
IPlayer
Contract that every player in the Cincuentazo game must fulfill, regardless of whether they are human or computer-controlled.
ITimerListener
Callback interface that receives timer events from GameTimer.
Main
 
SceneManager
Singleton that manages all scene transitions in the Cincuentazo application.
SelectionController
Controller for the machine selection screen (selection-view.fxml).
Table
Represents the physical table in the Cincuentazo game.
WelcomeController
Controller for the welcome screen (welcome-view.fxml).
